name: @univ-lehavre/atlas-redcap-sandbox
description: REDCap testing sandbox - Docker environment and contract tests for validating OpenAPI specs
author: Pierre-Olivier Chasset

scripts.docker:up: pnpm docker:prepare && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml down -v && pnpm docker:prepare && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.test:docker: pnpm docker:reset && pnpm docker:install && pnpm test:setup && pnpm test:contract
